same_as_en_keys.english: This app was designed and developed by @maxxetto
Quick help cards for the main tools in the app. Open the ones you need and keep scrolling for the rest.
Boss advantage is calculated automatically based on the selected elements.
Select boss elements and the minimum victory threshold you are interested in.
With Premium active, 2 Friend slots are unlocked for Epic Boss.
Select the boss level and elements you want to simulate, plus the milestone you want to reach for the gem cost calculation.

Battle simulation with Cyclone Boost. Every turn from the first, the active knight ATK increases by {cyclone}%, stacking for 5 consecutive turns. From turn 6 onward, the boost stays constant. This mode is always gemmed: 4 gems are spent per knight turn.

Battle simulation with Durable Rock Shield. The effect is applied when the pet casts according to the selected pet bar sequence ({petSkillUsage}) and each recast refreshes the {durationDRS}-turn duration.
Battle simulation with Durable Rock Shield. Every {hitsToDRS} turns, the active knight gains a DEF boost of {durableRockShield} for {durationDRS} turns.
Battle simulation without pet skills. Knights use SPECIAL every {knightToSpecial} turns, while the Boss every {bossToSpecial} turns.
Simulation using the old engine. Knights use SPECIAL every turn from turn 1 and the Boss cannot use SPECIAL.

Battle simulation with Shatter Shield. At turn {hitsToFirstShatter}, and then every {hitsToNextShatter} turns, the active knight gains a shield of {shatterBaseHp} HP (+{shatterBonusHp} HP if pet element matches).
Battle simulation with Special Regeneration (assumed infinite). From turn {knightToSpecialSR} onward, knights use SPECIAL every turn.

Battle simulation with Special Regeneration (assumed infinite). From turn {knightToSpecialSR} onward, knights use SPECIAL every turn. Then every {hitsToElementalWeakness} turns, Elemental Weakness is applied to the Boss: -{reductionElementalWeakness} ATK for {durationElementalWeakness} turns.

Battle simulation with Special Regeneration (assumed infinite). From turn {knightToSpecialSR} onward, knights use SPECIAL every turn. Elemental Weakness is applied when the pet casts Special 1 (-{reductionElementalWeakness} ATK for {durationElementalWeakness} boss turns). The numeric EW interval ({hitsToElementalWeakness}) is ignored while pet bar mode is active.
BT#{bt} Boss {act} â†’ K#{k} -{dmg} (base={base}, EWstacks={stacks}, critRoll={critRoll} < {critTarget}, {hpLabel}={hp})
EW applied: stacks={stacks} (effectiveReduction={reduction}%, dur={dur} bossTurns; miss does NOT tick)
KT#{kt} K#{k} uses stun â†’ Boss stunned
KT#{kt} K#{k} STUN (roll={roll} < {target}) â†’ Boss stunned
KT#{kt} Shatter Shield â†’ +{add} HP (base={base}, bonus={bonus}) ({hpLabel}={hp})
KT#{turn} SR active â†’ special ALWAYS from now
Old Simulator: knight SPECIAL always from KT#1; boss SPECIAL disabled (fakeEW={fake})
SR active -> special ALWAYS from now
SR+EW: SR active from KT#{sr}; EW every {ew} turns after KT#{sr} (stacking EW)
SR: special every turn from KT#{turn} onward
Debug mode is available only with Premium.

This section is available with Premium only.
Enable Premium from Home (⭐ icon).
Free users can add up to 5 elixirs.

Elixirs provide a points boost for a limited time and are used in the gem cost calculation to reach the required milestone. They are applied in the same order you add them. Free users can add up to 5 elixirs, while Premium users can select all available elixirs.
Level data not available, please submit statistics.
Epic mode is not implemented yet.
Selected levels must appear in the recommended board for Fastest path.
Use one player per line: 1200000, Maxxetto
Estimate how many bosses your guild needs to kill to reach a target score. Player score always counts in full, overkill counts, and boss kill bonus is added only when the boss dies.
Search by name or friend code...
Friends section is available after upgrading to Premium.
Insert the data of your knights below:
Adjust image crop percentages (0-100) before selecting the screenshot.
Use values from 0 to 100. Left+Right and Top+Bottom must stay below 100.
Unable to read knight stats from screenshot.
Enter at least one knight before applying.
Edit the values if needed, then apply.
Fill all three fields (ATK, DEF, HP) or leave all empty for a knight.
Knight advantage is calculated automatically based on the selected elements.
Enter the knight information: ATK, DEF, HP, stun chance and elements. The image icon imports stats from a screenshot, while the star icon quickly inserts a favorite armor.
No active or recently ended events.
No events available in this section right now.
No tracked rewards yet. Use the checkboxes in the table.
Manual values stay saved for this event.
Enter what you currently have. Checked table rewards are added automatically on top.
Use 0 to deselect. No event limit.
No shop items match this search.
Select items and quantities to calculate required resources.
{count} selected item(s). Resource totals updated automatically.
Select the shop items you want, set the quantity for each item, and the app will automatically calculate the total resources required grouped by currency.
Tables are shown while the event is active and remain visible for a short grace period after the end date.
No favorite pets yet. Star a pet in the Pet Compendium to see it here.
Favorite pets: {count}/{limit}. Premium unlocks unlimited favorites.
Free users can save up to {limit} favorite pets. You are at {count}/{limit}. Premium unlocks unlimited favorites.
No favorite pets match the current search.
Quickly insert your saved pets using the highest tier and highest level available.
Default values are prefilled. Set any numeric value to 0 to disable that skill effect for the simulation.
Uses Special 1, then Special 2, then repeats.
Starts with Special 2 twice, then always uses Special 1.
Always fills once and uses Special 1.
Always fills to Special 2 and uses it.
Starts with Special 2, then always uses Special 1.
Pet advantage is calculated automatically based on the selected elements.
Enter pet ATK, Elemental ATK, Elemental DEF and elements. Select pet skills and pet bar usage.
Pick one or two skills to match pet combos more easily.
No pets match the current filters.
Browse pets, filter by rarity, tier or skill, and import the selected pet into the Pet section.
Big thanks to Kasper534 for the help gathering all the data.
Search by pet name or skill to find the whole pet family. Cards always open on the highest tier and highest level available. Tap the Tier and Level badges to cycle through the data we have recorded.
Increases Knight Attack for a limited number of turns.
Increases Knight Attack for a limited number of turns.
Makes the next attack a Critical Hit with extra damage.
Increases Knight Defense for a limited number of turns.
Reduces enemy Attack for a limited number of turns.
Provides a fortune-themed pet support effect.
Increases Critical Hit chance for the next turns.
Increases Pet Attack to deal higher damage based on knight HP lost.
Increases Pet Attack for a powerful strike.
Summons a shield that absorbs incoming damage.
Launches a curse attack that deals damage over multiple turns.
Increases the Special Attack Meter charge rate for multiple turns.
Provides infinite Special Regeneration once triggered.
Deals flat damage and steals HP from the enemy's lost HP.
Purchase failed. Check store configuration and retry.
Another purchase is already in progress.
Network error. Check connection and retry.
Purchases not allowed for this account/device.
Product not available. Verify Play product/base plan is active.
Store problem. Retry in a few minutes.
No products available. Check store configuration.
Premium unavailable: RevenueCat is not configured in this build. Set RC_ANDROID_API_KEY (--dart-define) or revenueCatApiKey in android/key.properties.
Purchase failed. Check tester account and Play product status.
A system sheet was opened. After redeeming, come back here and tap Restore.
The store is not available on this device/session.
Coupon redemption via store is only supported on Android/iOS.
Restore completed. If you purchased, Premium will enable shortly.
No active subscription to restore. Your previous subscription is expired.
No active purchases found for this store account.
Premium is active on this device/account.
Activate Premium to unlock extra results and Debug.
Open only the panels you need for a deeper breakdown.
Swipe left/right to move across setup result pages and this comparison page.
Always gemmed: 4 gems per knight turn.
Uses the normal pet bar flow and selected pet skill usage.
Paste a results export JSON (copied from a Simulation Report).
You can import reports exported from the Results page to review the same setup/result locally.
Refreshing the cast renews the active duration.
Pet bar: bootstrap with Special 2, then Special 1 applies EW.
EW is triggered by Pet Special 1 after the SR bootstrap phase.
Pet bar: Special 2 builds permanent SR stacks.
Use the copy button to export this report as JSON. Another user can import it from Home > Utilities > Import results to review the same report locally.
You can scroll or swipe horizontally on the tables to view all data.
After saving setups, you can use Bulk Simulate to run all saved setups sequentially (up to 3 setups, or up to 5 with Premium).
The simulator is very powerful, so you can also run very high simulation counts (even above 500k runs).
The ON/OFF buttons enable or disable the knights used in the simulation. In Epic Boss, Premium users can also toggle 2 Friends slots.
Bulk simulation completed. Bulk results view arrives in the next step.
Save at least 2 setups before using Bulk Simulate.
Setups are disabled while Debug is active.
Paste a setup export JSON (copied from another device/player).
If the target slot is occupied, you will be asked for overwrite confirmation. You can choose a new name before saving.
Tap Load to apply a saved setup.
Optional. Leave empty to keep no custom name.
No saved setups yet. Use "Save setup" in Utilities.
Setups are available only in Raid / Blitz mode.
Choose which slot should store the current setup.
Use Export to copy a setup JSON and share it with guild members. Use Import on a slot to paste a received setup, review the overwrite confirmation if needed, then choose a name before saving.
Pure black background with theme-colored accents.
Obtained T20 armor of current and past month
Obtained T20 armor of the current month
Crafted Elite of previous two months
Crafted Elite+ of previous two months
Planner is locked. Unlock to edit values.
Hidden month. Still counted in totals.
Hidden month (kept in totals because locked).
Month is locked. Hidden locked months remain counted.
Month is locked. Unlock it to edit this month.
Toggle buttons enable related monthly sections. Pieces are counted only from selected rows inside the tables (Heroic, Headstart, EB Collection), not from the buttons themselves.
Hidden months stay counted in totals. Lock only prevents edits.
Progress is calculated month by month. Elite requires 10 pieces in the same month, Elite+ requires 20.
Check the base stats for Raid, Blitz and Epic bosses.
Starmetal has advantage against all elements.

Elixirs provide a temporary points boost and are used in the war calculation to optimize attacks and estimate the gems needed to reach the selected milestone. Elixirs are applied in the same order in which you add them.
Free users can add up to 5 elixirs. Premium users can select all available war elixirs.
Premium users can select all available war elixirs.
Base values and boosted values for the currently selected war mode.
Results summarize attacks, energy and gems based on the selected server/toggles and war elixirs. The optimizer automatically finds the best mix between normal attacks and PA when PA is enabled.
Set the target milestone and available energy, then choose server and toggles (Strip, Frenzy, PA) to simulate the correct war points table.
When PA is enabled, the calculator searches the best mix between normal attacks and Power Attacks to minimize gem cost for the selected target.
No favorite armors yet. Star an armor in the Wargear Wardrobe to see it here.
Favorite armors: {count}/{limit}. Premium unlocks up to {premiumLimit} favorite armors.
Free users can save up to {limit} favorite armors. You are at {count}/{limit}. Premium unlocks up to {premiumLimit} favorite armors.
No favorite armors match the current search.
Quickly insert your saved armors using the current role, rank and plus filters.
Tap an element to cycle its guild bonus from 0% to 10%. The first armor element uses the ring bonus, the second uses the amulet bonus.
Imported base armor as {name} | {rank} | {role} | {atk} / {def} / {hp} | Pet x{count} (+{bonusAtk} ATK, +{bonusDef} DEF)
No armor set matches the current filters.
Shows the stronger + version and imports those stats.
{target} recalculated using the current pet bonus and imported armor.
No imported armor is available to recalculate for this slot.
Scores use the current boss, pet and guild context.
Browse saved maxed armor sets, filter them quickly, then import the resolved stats and elements into the selected slot.
Big thanks to Kasper534 for the help gathering all the data.
Some selected elixirs have missing bonus or duration. Please choose only elixirs with valid bonus and duration.
Please select at least one non-friend knight.
The first active knight must match at least one pet element.
To use Special Regeneration, at least one knight must match the pet elements (only needed for the pet effects).
Run large battle simulations and review score, range, gem cost and detailed knight breakdowns.
Set Boss, Pet and Knights on the Home screen.
Choose the number of simulations and active knights.
Press Simulate to open the full report.
Replay one deterministic battle with a turn-by-turn log, live search and log copy.
Enable Debug from the quick actions menu.
Search the log or copy it for troubleshooting.
Manage pet stats, elements, selected skills, custom skill values and pet bar usage.
Set pet ATK, Elemental ATK, Elemental DEF and elements.
Choose Skill Slot 1, Skill Slot 2 and pet bar order.
Adjust skill numbers when you want custom testing.
Browse pet families, filter by rarity and skill, then import the selected pet directly into the Home setup.
Search by pet name, skill or family tag.
Pick tier, level and skill set, then tap Use pet.
Import ATK, DEF and HP for all three knights from a screenshot with crop controls and a review step.
Tap the image icon in the Knights section.
Adjust the crop values and choose your screenshot.
Review the detected numbers before applying them.
Import maxed armor sets with filters for elements, role, guild rank, guild element bonuses and Base / + version, including special UA and Starmetal outliers.
Open Utilities > Wargear Wardrobe or the star inside a slot.
Filter armor by role, rank, elements, version and guild element bonuses.
Tap Use armor to import stats into the selected slot.
Compare favorite armors with a fast contextual score based on the current boss, pet setup, knight slot and resolved armor stats.
Set the current boss and pet on the Home screen.
Open the star inside a knight slot to browse favorite armors.
Sort by score, compare the shown values and import the armor you want.
Check the base ATK, DEF and HP tables for Raid, Blitz and Epic Boss in one place.
Switch between Raid, Blitz and Epic.
Read the level table you need before simulating or sharing a setup.
Save your Raid / Blitz builds, reload them later, share them with others and compare multiple setups in one batch.
Save a setup from Utilities > Save setup.
Open Setups from the top quick actions menu to load, rename, export or import.
Use Bulk Simulate once you have at least two saved setups.
Plan attacks, Power Attacks, energy and gems for War milestones with EU / Global, Strip, Frenzy and elixir support.
Set server, toggles and PA strategy to read the final plan.
Track monthly UA progress, event rewards, placements and bonus conditions with export and import support.
Enable the events you are playing that month.
Enter score and placement values to see Elite and Elite+ progress.
Follow event schedules, track completed rows and calculate required shop currencies from your selected items.
Switch between Active, Ended and Upcoming events.
Use the event shop planner to total the currencies you still need.
Add player nicknames and average scores per boss level. The optimizer will keep those players on their selected levels.
No players added for this level yet.
Simulate Epic Boss runs and review results with the dedicated Epic flow.
Open the Epic flow from the main Raid setup.
Set your knights, pet and Epic boss context.
Run the simulation to review the Epic results page.
With Premium: unlock friend slots in Epic setups.
With Premium: unlock the full favorites and advanced pet workflow.
With Premium: unlock favorite armor shortcuts and contextual score-assisted comparison.
Imported armor cards on the Raid Home screen show tappable badges for role, guild rank and version, so you can cycle them and recalculate stats instantly.
Import an armor into a knight or friend slot from Wargear Wardrobe.
Tap the Role, Rank or Version badge on the Home card.
Each tap cycles the badge and recalculates the imported armor stats.

Filter armor by role, rank, elements, version and guild element bonuses.
Tap Use armor to import stats into the selected slot.
Compare favorite armors with a fast contextual score based on the current boss, pet setup, knight slot and resolved armor stats.
Set the current boss and pet on the Home screen.
Open the star inside a knight slot to browse favorite armors.
Sort by score, compare the shown values and import the armor you want.
Check the base ATK, DEF and HP tables for Raid, Blitz and Epic Boss in one place.
Switch between Raid, Blitz and Epic.
Read the level table you need before simulating or sharing a setup.
Save your Raid / Blitz builds, reload them later, share them with others and compare multiple setups in one batch.
Save a setup from Utilities > Save setup.
Open Setups from the top quick actions menu to load, rename, export or import.
Use Bulk Simulate once you have at least two saved setups.
Plan attacks, Power Attacks, energy and gems for War milestones with EU / Global, Strip, Frenzy and elixir support.
Set server, toggles and PA strategy to read the final plan.

This app was designed and developed by @maxxetto
Quick help cards for the main tools in the app. Open the ones you need and keep scrolling for the rest.
Boss advantage is calculated automatically based on the selected elements.
Select boss elements and the minimum victory threshold you are interested in.
With Premium active, 2 Friend slots are unlocked for Epic Boss.
Select the boss level and elements you want to simulate, plus the milestone you want to reach for the gem cost calculation.

Battle simulation with Cyclone Boost. Every turn from the first, the active knight ATK increases by {cyclone}%, stacking for 5 consecutive turns. From turn 6 onward, the boost stays constant. This mode is always gemmed: 4 gems are spent per knight turn.

Battle simulation with Durable Rock Shield. The effect is applied when the pet casts according to the selected pet bar sequence ({petSkillUsage}) and each recast refreshes the {durationDRS}-turn duration.
Battle simulation with Durable Rock Shield. Every {hitsToDRS} turns, the active knight gains a DEF boost of {durableRockShield} for {durationDRS} turns.
Battle simulation without pet skills. Knights use SPECIAL every {knightToSpecial} turns, while the Boss every {bossToSpecial} turns.
Simulation using the old engine. Knights use SPECIAL every turn from turn 1 and the Boss cannot use SPECIAL.

Battle simulation with Shatter Shield. At turn {hitsToFirstShatter}, and then every {hitsToNextShatter} turns, the active knight gains a shield of {shatterBaseHp} HP (+{shatterBonusHp} HP if pet element matches).
Battle simulation with Special Regeneration (assumed infinite). From turn {knightToSpecialSR} onward, knights use SPECIAL every turn.

Battle simulation with Special Regeneration (assumed infinite). From turn {knightToSpecialSR} onward, knights use SPECIAL every turn. Then every {hitsToElementalWeakness} turns, Elemental Weakness is applied to the Boss: -{reductionElementalWeakness} ATK for {durationElementalWeakness} turns.

Battle simulation with Special Regeneration (assumed infinite). From turn {knightToSpecialSR} onward, knights use SPECIAL every turn. Elemental Weakness is applied when the pet casts Special 1 (-{reductionElementalWeakness} ATK for {durationElementalWeakness} boss turns). The numeric EW interval ({hitsToElementalWeakness}) is ignored while pet bar mode is active.
BT#{bt} Boss {act} â†’ K#{k} -{dmg} (base={base}, EWstacks={stacks}, critRoll={critRoll} < {critTarget}, {hpLabel}={hp})
EW applied: stacks={stacks} (effectiveReduction={reduction}%, dur={dur} bossTurns; miss does NOT tick)
KT#{kt} K#{k} uses stun â†’ Boss stunned
KT#{kt} K#{k} STUN (roll={roll} < {target}) â†’ Boss stunned
KT#{kt} Shatter Shield â†’ +{add} HP (base={base}, bonus={bonus}) ({hpLabel}={hp})
KT#{turn} SR active â†’ special ALWAYS from now
Old Simulator: knight SPECIAL always from KT#1; boss SPECIAL disabled (fakeEW={fake})
SR active -> special ALWAYS from now
SR+EW: SR active from KT#{sr}; EW every {ew} turns after KT#{sr} (stacking EW)
SR: special every turn from KT#{turn} onward
Debug mode is available only with Premium.

This section is available with Premium only.
Enable Premium from Home (⭐ icon).
Free users can add up to 5 elixirs.

Elixirs provide a points boost for a limited time and are used in the gem cost calculation to reach the required milestone. They are applied in the same order you add them. Free users can add up to 5 elixirs, while Premium users can select all available elixirs.
Level data not available, please submit statistics.
Epic mode is not implemented yet.
Selected levels must appear in the recommended board for Fastest path.
Use one player per line: 1200000, Maxxetto
Estimate how many bosses your guild needs to kill to reach a target score. Player score always counts in full, overkill counts, and boss kill bonus is added only when the boss dies.
Search by name or friend code...
Friends section is available after upgrading to Premium.
Insert the data of your knights below:
Adjust image crop percentages (0-100) before selecting the screenshot.
Use values from 0 to 100. Left+Right and Top+Bottom must stay below 100.
Unable to read knight stats from screenshot.
Enter at least one knight before applying.
Edit the values if needed, then apply.
Fill all three fields (ATK, DEF, HP) or leave all empty for a knight.
Knight advantage is calculated automatically based on the selected elements.
Enter the knight information: ATK, DEF, HP, stun chance and elements. The image icon imports stats from a screenshot, while the star icon quickly inserts a favorite armor.

Default values are prefilled. Set any numeric value to 0 to disable that skill effect for the simulation.
Uses Special 1, then Special 2, then repeats.
Starts with Special 2 twice, then always uses Special 1.
Always fills once and uses Special 1.
Always fills to Special 2 and uses it.

No pets match the current filters.
Browse pets, filter by rarity, tier or skill, and import the selected pet into the Pet section.
Big thanks to Kasper534 for the help gathering all the data.
Search by pet name or skill to find the whole pet family. Cards always open on the highest tier and highest level available. Tap the Tier and Level badges to cycle through the data we have recorded.
Increases Knight Attack for a limited number of turns.
Increases Knight Attack for a limited number of turns.
Makes the next attack a Critical Hit with extra damage.
Increases Knight Defense for a limited number of turns.
Reduces enemy Attack for a limited number of turns.
Provides a fortune-themed pet support effect.
Increases Critical Hit chance for the next turns.
Increases Pet Attack to deal higher damage based on knight HP lost.
Increases Pet Attack for a powerful strike.
Summons a shield that absorbs incoming damage.
Launches a curse attack that deals damage over multiple turns.
Increases the Special Attack Meter charge rate for multiple turns.
Provides infinite Special Regeneration once triggered.
Deals flat damage and steals HP from the enemy's lost HP.

The simulator is very powerful, so you can also run very high simulation counts (even above 500k runs).

Elixirs provide a temporary points boost and are used in the war calculation to optimize attacks and estimate the gems needed to reach the selected milestone. Elixirs are applied in the same order in which you add them.
Free users can add up to 5 elixirs. Premium users can select all available war elixirs.
Premium users can select all available war elixirs.
Base values and boosted values for the currently selected war mode.
Results summarize attacks, energy and gems based on the selected server/toggles and war elixirs. The optimizer automatically finds the best mix between normal attacks and PA when PA is enabled.
Set the target milestone and available energy, then choose server and toggles (Strip, Frenzy, PA) to simulate the correct war points table.
When PA is enabled, the calculator searches the best mix between normal attacks and Power Attacks to minimize gem cost for the selected target.
